gauge.name: Tippecanoe River below Oakdale Dam

impacts.statement: Approximate low steel elevation of CR 725 N.  Near record to record flooding in progress.

Major flooding in progress.  Extensive flooding of Jefferson Township Conservation Club grounds and residential areas along CR 1200 W and 1225 W south of CR 725 N, Horseshoe Bend, Tecumseh Bend and Tippecanoe Ranch Estates.
Flooding of residential property in the Oakdale area near the dam and Horseshoe Bend area. Flooding also likely in Tecumseh Bend area and Tippecanoe Ranch Estates.
Carroll County Roads 1200 W and 1225 W south CR 725 N are closed.  Four feet of water in some yards in the Horseshoe Bend area.  Most other county roads near the river remain open.
Carroll County EMA recommends voluntary evacuations for vulnerable areas at this level if significant rain is forecast for the local area.
County Road 1225 W south of CR 725 N begins to flood.  Flooding of yards begins.
Oakdale Public Access Site is flooded.
Handicapped area of Oakdale Public Access Site flooded.
Tippecanoe River at bankfull level in Oakdale area.  Most of the solidly mounted piers are underwater. During warm season items such as lawn chairs, boats and building supplies can be swept away.

value.label: North American Vertical Datum of 1988
value.description: A fixed reference for elevations determined by geodetic leveling. The datum was derived from a general adjustment of the first-order terrestrial leveling nets of the United States, Canada, and Mexico. In the adjustment, only the height of the primary tidal bench mark, referenced to the International Great Lakes Datum of 1985 (IGLD 85) local mean sea level height value, at Father Point, Rimouski, Quebec, Canada was held fixed, thus providing minimum constraint. NAVD 88 and IGLD 85 are identical. However, NAVD 88 bench mark values are given in Helmert orthometric height units while IGLD 85 values are in dynamic heights. See International Great Lakes Datum of 1985, National Geodetic Vertical Datum of 1929, and geopotential difference. NAVD 88 should not be used as Mean Sea Level.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
